welcome.tagline:
The new way of communication.
Fast. Secure. Limitless.
welcome.restoreInfo: Users can restore their account with a personal Recovery QR Code or Recovery Key.
welcome.restoreBullet1: The recovery QR code contains encrypted identity, roles and settings.
welcome.restoreBullet2: Chat histories and shared calendar data are automatically reloaded from other members.
welcome.restoreBullet3: Private appointments and personal settings are loaded from the recovery QR.
welcome.restoreWarning: Keep your recovery QR code safe. It is the only way to restore your account after device loss. A new QR code is needed after every identity or space change.
welcome.enterRecoveryKey: Paste your recovery key that you received during registration.
welcome.invalidKey: Invalid key. Please check your input.
welcome.eudiRestoreInfo: Enter your EUDI hash to restore your account on this device. AregoID, FSK level, and subscription status will be automatically recovered.
welcome.eudiRestoreHint: EUDI Wallet will be automatically connected from 2026/2027. Until then: enter the same hash you chose during registration.
welcome.eudiHashNotFound: This hash is not registered. Please check your input.
welcome.eudiConflictText: This hash is already active on another device. Which device should be kept?
welcome.scanParentQR: Scan the QR code from the parent device
welcome.childInfo: Scan the QR code from the parent app or enter the link code manually to set up this device as a child account.

registration.identityLocal: Your identity is created locally on your device with a cryptographic key pair.
registration.noPassword: No password. No username. No server stores your credentials.
registration.displayNameHint: Your display name — can be changed later.
registration.nameOptional: Can also be left empty — you can change it anytime in your profile.
registration.generatingKeyDesc: Your cryptographic key pair is being created directly on your device (P-256 / ECDSA).
registration.saveQRHint: Save this QR code — it is the only way to restore your account on a new device.
registration.qrWarning: The QR code contains your private key. Store it securely and do not share it with anyone.
registration.backupConfirm: I have securely saved the QR code or key and understand that it cannot be recovered.
registration.generateError: Error generating identity. Please try again.

dashboard.whatToDo: What would you like to do?

chatList.title: Chats
chatList.newChatDesc: Write to a person or group...
chatList.noChatsDesc: Start a new chat with one of your contacts

people.title: Contacts
people.addContactDesc: Via QR code or short code
people.noContactsDesc: Add contacts via QR code or short code
people.removeConfirmDesc: This contact will be removed from your device and the contact's device. If you want to chat again, you'll need to add each other as contacts again. Chat and call history will not be deleted.
people.chooseAgeLevel: Choose an age level for the new profile.

addContact.title: Add Contact
addContact.singleUse: Single use · automatically invalid after use
addContact.privacyNote: The code contains only your name and public key. No server stores your contacts.
addContact.autoExchange: Once someone enters your code, you will automatically be saved as mutual contacts — even if this window is closed.
addContact.serverUnreachable: Signaling server not reachable. Short code unavailable.
addContact.codeUsed: This code has already been used.
addContact.codeNotFound: Code not found or already expired.
addContact.connectionError: Server not reachable. Check your connection.
addContact.enterShortCode: Enter 6-digit code — received via SMS, phone or messenger
addContact.scanQRHint: Scan the other person's QR code
addContact.cameraError: Could not open camera. Please allow access.
addContact.privacyInfo: The code only contains your name and public key. No server stores your contacts.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.idUnique: This ID is unique and cannot be changed. Other users can find you through it.
profile.privacyNote: All following data is optional. It is <u>not</u> stored on the server but remains exclusively on your device.

settings.title: Settings
settings.resetConfirmDesc: Your local key and all stored data will be permanently deleted. Only the recovery QR code can save your account.
settings.startScreenDesc: Sets which view is displayed first when starting the app.
settings.privacyNote: Your data is stored only locally on your device. Aregoland has no access to your messages or contacts.
settings.profileVisibilityDesc: Who can see your profile information (name, photo)?
settings.visFamilyDesc: Only contacts in the Family category
settings.visNobodyDesc: Profile info will not be shared
settings.childNotDiscoverable: Child accounts are not publicly discoverable
settings.notifBlocked: Notifications are blocked in the browser. Please allow them in browser settings.
settings.discoverableDesc: Others can search and find you by your name
settings.faqAregoIdA: Your Arego ID is a unique identifier derived from your cryptographic key. It identifies you in the network without a server knowing your personal data.
settings.faqAddContact: How do I add a contact?
settings.faqAddContactA: Go to Contacts and tap the plus icon. You can scan a QR code or enter a 6-digit short code that your contact shares with you.
settings.faqRecovery: What if I lose my device?
settings.faqRecoveryA: You can restore your account with the recovery QR code or text key you received during registration. Without this key, the account cannot be recovered.
settings.faqE2EA: Yes. All messages, photos, files and calls are end-to-end encrypted. The server cannot read the contents. Encryption uses ephemeral ECDH keys and AES-GCM-256.
settings.faqDelete: What happens when I delete my account?
settings.faqDeleteA: All data is immediately and permanently deleted from your device. Since no data is stored on a server, there is no way to recover it.
settings.showOnlineStatusDesc: When off, you appear offline to everyone
settings.familyInfo: Manage your children's accounts here. Child accounts are protected with age-appropriate restrictions and linked to your account.
settings.qrTTL: QR code valid for 10 minutes · single use
settings.gdprExportDesc: Structured JSON export per GDPR Art. 20

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.priorityHint: The order determines which appointments take priority.

call.recordConsentMessage: {{name}} wants to record this call. All participants must agree.

qrScreen.title: QR Code
qrScreen.scanHint: Others can scan this code to add you as a contact.
qrScreen.autoRenew: This code renews automatically for your security.
qrScreen.cameraRequired: Camera access required to scan QR codes.
qrScreen.pointCamera: Point your camera at a QR code
qrScreen.noCamera: No camera found. Please allow camera access or use a device with a camera.
qrScreen.addContactQuestion: Would you like to add this person as a contact?
qrScreen.childLinkDesc: This QR code links a child account to {{name}}. Use the Welcome Screen to set up a child account.

connect.title: Connect
connect.findCommunityDesc: Whether dating, friendships or events — discover people who match you.

documents.title: Documents
documents.emptyHint: Soon you will find all your important files, contracts and documents in one place.

spaces.title: Spaces
spaces.createFirstHint: Create your first space with the + button
spaces.spaceNamePlaceholder: What should the space be called?
spaces.tmplDesc_family: Private, everyone sees everyone, shared calendar
spaces.tmplDesc_community: Open or closed, for groups & interested people
spaces.relayNodeDesc: As the creator, you are the primary relay node for this space. Messages are distributed via your device when online. Voluntary co-hosts can share the load later.
spaces.emptyOverview: No chats or events yet. Invite members to get started.
spaces.noChatsYet: No chats in this space yet.
spaces.noSubroomAccess: No access — a moderator must assign you a role.
spaces.inviteMemberDesc: Via QR code or short code
spaces.roleDesc_admin: Full access, can manage members and settings
spaces.roleDesc_moderator: Can create posts, moderate chats and manage events
spaces.roleDesc_member: Can participate in chats, view posts and respond to events
spaces.roleDesc_guest: Read only — can view posts and events but cannot write
spaces.noMessagesYet: No messages yet. Write the first one!
spaces.readOnlyChat: Read only — you don't have write access
spaces.moderatorCoHostInfo: Moderators are automatically co-hosts and help keep the space stable. The more moderators are online, the more stable chats and calls are.
spaces.relayNodeActiveDesc: You are helping as a relay node to distribute messages and calls in the space.
spaces.relayNodeOffWarning: You are no longer helping as a relay node. This may affect quality for other members with poor internet.
spaces.adminAlwaysAccess: Founder & Admin always have full access.
spaces.spaceNotificationsDesc: Turn notifications for this space on/off
spaces.largeFileWarning: "{{name}}" is {{size}} MB. This may take a moment.
spaces.networkHelperDesc: You are helping as a network helper to distribute messages and calls in the space.
spaces.networkHelperOffWarning: You are no longer helping as a network helper. This may affect quality for other members.
spaces.useMobileDataDesc: Stay active as network helper even on mobile data
spaces.mobileDataDetected: You are connected via mobile data. Network helper was disabled to save your data allowance. Enable "Use mobile data" if you have an unlimited plan.
spaces.createSpaceInfo: Aregoland stores nothing. No messages, no files, no data on our servers. Everything runs directly between your devices. Network helpers in your space share their bandwidth — the more there are, the faster and more stable everything is.
spaces.networkHelperRoleHint: Members of this role can voluntarily become network helpers. They share some bandwidth so other members are connected faster and more reliably. With 10,000 employees in a company, this means: lightning fast, available 24/7, without a single server from us.
spaces.networkHelperProfileHint: As a network helper you help other members stay directly connected. Nobody can see your messages and files — everything stays encrypted.
spaces.guestHint: Guest = default for everyone without an assigned role
spaces.guestRoleHint: Guest is the default role for everyone who joined the space without being assigned a role.
spaces.worldDesc: The public social media area of Aregoland. Spaces publish content — visible to all users according to their age rating. No algorithm. Chronological. Safe for children.
spaces.worldPrivacy: No addictive algorithm. No autoplay. No recommendation traps. Screen time limits based on science — not changeable by parents.
spaces.transferFounderDesc: Choose an admin to transfer founder rights to. You will be demoted to admin. This cannot be undone.
spaces.transferFounderConfirm: You will lose all founder rights. This cannot be undone. Continue?
spaces.deleteConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this space?
spaces.deleteConfirmDesc: All messages, news, chats and memberships will be permanently deleted.
spaces.deleteTransferTitle: Would you rather transfer the space to another member?
spaces.deleteFinalTitle: I understand, everything will be deleted
spaces.fullAccessHint: Founder & Admin always have full access — not configurable.
spaces.mobileDataManualWarning: You are currently connected via mobile data. As a network helper, additional data will be used. Only enable if you have an unlimited plan.
spaces.channelRoleTransparencyTitle: Who has access to this channel?
spaces.myRoomsEmpty: You are not managing any subrooms yet.
spaces.absenceSelectChild: Which child would you like to report for?
spaces.bookingNoSlotsGenerated: No slots in selected time window
spaces.bookingRequestDesc: Send a booking request to the moderator
spaces.timetableEmpty: No lessons scheduled for this day

childProfile.title: Child Profiles
childProfile.childProtectionDesc: Manage your children's accounts here. You can restrict usage times and contacts.
childProfile.selectAgeDesc: Choose an appropriate preset for your child.
childProfile.scanQRDesc: Open the Aregoland app on your child's phone and scan this code to activate the profile.
childProfile.fsk6Desc: Highly restricted. Only approved contacts. No external links.
childProfile.fsk12Desc: Restricted. Contact requests must be approved. Content filter active.
childProfile.fsk14Desc: Standard. Full chat access, but no public profiles.
childProfile.fsk16Desc: Almost unrestricted. Warnings for sensitive content.
childProfile.scanChildQR: Scan this code with your child's phone to activate the profile.
